overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man featuring Miles Morales walking along a rain-soaked residential sidewalk. The character navigates past pedestrians and parked cars under overcast skies with dramatic sun rays breaking through, eventually crossing the busy street between moving vehicles.

events.description: white sedan drives past on the wet street
large Consolidated Shipping truck enters view and drives along the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, observing street activity and surroundings

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story suburban homes with porches and varied architecture
mature oak trees forming dense overhead cover along the sidewalk
row of parked vehicles including sedans and vans along the curb
well-maintained green hedge bordering the sidewalk
large blue and white box truck with company logo

segments.scene_description: Walking along a tree-lined residential sidewalk with wet pavement reflecting the overcast sky. Mature trees form a canopy overhead while parked cars line the left side and a hedge runs along the right. A large delivery truck passes by on the street as the character walks steadily forward.

events.description: character briefly stops and turns to look at pedestrian on the right
downtown skyscrapers become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk, navigating around pedestrians and observing the delivery truck ahead

notable_agents.action: child in gray hoodie and blue jeans walking alongside the character
consolidated shipping truck moving slowly along the street

entered.detail: tall modern glass and steel buildings visible in the distance
black garbage bags piled near a street lamp

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the residential sidewalk with the tree canopy now primarily on the left. The character passes black trash bags and navigates around pedestrians including a child in a gray hoodie. Downtown skyscrapers become visible in the distance while the Consolidated Shipping truck moves ahead down the street.

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk curb and begins crossing the street
character runs between moving vehicles to cross the wet asphalt

agents.ego_description: stepping into the street and running across between cars to reach the other side

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving past as the character crosses in front

entered.detail: wet black asphalt street surface with puddles reflecting light
cars driving along the road including a red sedan and silver SUV

segments.scene_description: Stepping off the curb onto the wet asphalt street, the character runs across between moving vehicles including a red sedan. The downtown skyscrapers are now prominent on the right side as the camera crosses the road, leaving the tree-lined sidewalk behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked residential sidewalk that eventually opens up to a busy city street with a view of distant skyscrapers. It begins by tracking the character beneath a canopy of mature trees, moving past parked cars and a passing delivery truck on wet, reflective pavement. As the character continues forward, the tree cover shifts to the left and the path opens up, passing pedestrians and trash bags while the downtown skyline emerges on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the character steps off the curb and runs across the asphalt street, weaving between moving vehicles like a red sedan. Finally, the camera leaves the residential greenery behind, centering on the prominent skyscrapers as the character completes the crossing.
